title: cajanus helvolus
intro: Cajanus helvolus, also known as the hairy clerodendrum or hairy dillenia, is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with C. helvolus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit immunomodulatory and hepatoprotective activities. In herbal preparations, C. helvolus is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or as a component in traditional remedies for various ailments.
